# Caching.MethodToNotification property

Maps each cacheable method to the notification that signals a change to its data; when the notification arrives the client MUST discard the cached result and re-fetch (§13.5, R-13.5-a/j). Mirrors TS `METHOD_TO_NOTIFICATION_MAP`.

```csharp
public static IReadOnlyDictionary<string, string> MethodToNotification { get; }
```
